summary: Done: added return_positions kwarg to encode(); changed the try/except body to assign to a local 'tokens' var (instead of early-return) then return (tokens, positions) via decode_with_offsets when return_positions=True; signature/docstring/try-except body of encode() all touched, no other methods changed
